descFull: EN: ManimCat: AI-generated math animations from natural language. High-quality Manim rendering with LaTeX support and auto-code fixing. 中: ManimCat：AI 数学动画生成器。支持描述即视频，内置 LaTeX 与代码纠错，让数学动效触手可及。
